{{Short description|none}}
 <!-- This short description is INTENTIONALLY "none" - please see WP:SDNONE before you consider changing it! -->
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|British Virgin Islands women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=June 2021}}
{{Infobox national football team
| Name                  = British Virgin Islands
| Badge                 = 
| Badge_size            = 200px
| Nickname              = ''The Nature Boys''
| Association           = [[British Virgin Islands Football Association]] (BVIFA)
| Confederation         = [[CONCACAF]] (North America)
| Sub-confederation     = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Coach                 = [[David Pérez (football manager)|David Pérez]]
| Captain               = [[T'Sharne Gallimore]]
| Most caps             = [[Kristian Javier]] (35)
| Top scorer            = [[Tyler Forbes (footballer, born 2002)| Tyler Forbes]] (7)
| Home Stadium          = [[A.O. Shirley Recreation Ground]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = VGB
| FIFA Rank             = {{FIFA World Rankings|VGB}}
| FIFA max              = 160
| FIFA max date         = March 2000, August–November 2002
| FIFA min              = 209
| FIFA min date         = March 2022, June 2026
| Elo Rank              = {{World Football Elo Ratings|British Virgin Islands}}
| Elo max               = 171
| Elo max date          = 1989
| Elo min               = 230
| Elo min date          = 2017
| pattern_la1           = 
| pattern_b1            = 
| pattern_ra1           = 
| pattern_sh1           = _shorts
| pattern_so1           = _socks
| leftarm1              = 167A42
| body1                 = 167A42
| rightarm1             = 167A42
| shorts1               = 000000
| socks1                = 000000
| pattern_la2           = 
| pattern_b2            = 
| pattern_ra2           = 
| pattern_sh2           = _shorts
| pattern_so2           = _socks
| leftarm2              = FFF200
| body2                 = FFF200
| rightarm2             = FFF200
| shorts2               = FFF200
| socks2                = FFF200
| First game            = {{fb|AIA}} 0–1 {{fb-rt|VGB}}<br>([[The Valley, Anguilla|The Valley]], Anguilla; October 1985)
| Largest win           = {{fb|VGB}} 6–0 {{fb-rt|AIA}}<br>([[Marigot, Saint Martin|Marigot]], Saint Martin; 28 March 1990)<br>{{fb|BAH}} 0–6 {{fb-rt|VGB}}<br>([[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands; 15 November 2025)
| Largest loss          = {{nowrap|{{fb|DOM}} 17–0 {{fb-rt|VGB}}<br>([[San Cristóbal, Dominican Republic|San Cristóbal]], Dominican Republic; 14 October 2010)}}
| Regional name         = 
| Regional cup apps     =
| Regional cup first    =
| Regional cup best     =
}}

The '''British Virgin Islands national football team''' represents the [[British Virgin Islands]] ([[British Overseas Territories|British overseas territory]]) in men's international [[Association football|football]], which is governed by the [[British Virgin Islands Football Association]] founded in 1974. It has been a member of [[FIFA]] since 1996, an associate member of [[CONCACAF]] since 1994 and becoming a full member in 1996. Regionally, it is a member of [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] in the Caribbean Zone.

The British Virgin Islands has never qualified for the [[FIFA World Cup]] and the [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]], but has participated four times in League C of the [[CONCACAF Nations League]].

The British Virgin Islands' debut in international competitions was in the [[1989 Caribbean Cup#Qualifying tournament|1989 Caribbean Cup qualifying tournament]]. Their first appearance in World Cup qualifiers was in the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2002 CONCACAF qualification]]. The team achieved its first victory in 1985, defeating [[Anguilla national football team|Anguilla]] 1–0, which was also the first match in the team's history.

==History==
Early football games in the British Virgin Islands were between [[British Royal Navy]] crew, and expatriates. In 1968, the British Virgin Islands team was founded by a team of [[Royal Engineers]], and soon after, in 1974 the British Virgin Islands Football Association was founded.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.bvifootballassociation.com/index.php?option%3Dcom_content%26view%3Darticle%26id%3D16%26Itemid%3D4 |title=About Us |access-date=2013-05-19 |url-status=dead |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130513140514/http://www.bvifootballassociation.com/index.php?option=com_content&view=article&id=16&Itemid=4 |archive-date=2013-05-13 }}</ref> The former [[Tottenham Hotspur F.C.|Tottenham]], [[Chelsea F.C.|Chelsea]] and [[FC Porto|Porto]] manager, Portuguese [[André Villas-Boas]] had his first job as Technical Director of the national team British Virgin Islands in 2000 and 2001.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Fleming |first=Mark |date=2011-06-22 |title=Virgin Islands recall their days in the sun under former coach |url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/football/news/virgin-islands-recall-their-days-in-the-sun-under-former-coach-2301208.html |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170811230205/https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/football/news-and-comment/virgin-islands-recall-their-days-in-the-sun-under-former-coach-2301208.html |archive-date=2017-08-11 |access-date=2026-02-23 |website=The Independent |language=en}}</ref>

===World Cup qualification===
In the qualifying rounds for the [[2006 World Cup]] were drawn against [[St Lucia]], and they were eliminated 10–0 on aggregate.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Greenaway |first=Dean |date=2004-04-03 |title=St. Lucia flogs BVI 9-0 in World Cup qualifier |url=http://www.islandsun.com/2004-April/03042004/sports4-v13i01.html |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20110704234315/http://www.islandsun.com/2004-April/03042004/sports4-v13i01.html |archive-date=2011-07-04 |access-date=2026-02-23 |website=Island Sun}}</ref>

In the [[2010 FIFA World Cup qualification|qualifying rounds for the 2010 World Cup]] they were paired with the [[Bahamas national football team|Bahamas]]. They lost on the [[away goals rule]] after a 3–3 draw over both legs. Both matches were actually played in the Bahamas, but British Virgin Islands were designated as the home team in the second match, which ended 2–2.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.fifa.com/worldcup/preliminaries/nccamerica/matches/index.html |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20071129205133/http://www.fifa.com/worldcup/preliminaries/nccamerica/matches/index.html |url-status=dead |archive-date=29 November 2007 |title=2018 FIFA World Cup Russia – Qualifiers – North, Central America and Caribbean – All Matches |website=FIFA.com |date=2017-02-08 |access-date=2017-03-01}}</ref>
Despite going out of the competition in the first qualifying round, the British Virgin Islands were the only side to enter the [[2010 FIFA World Cup]] to remain unbeaten through qualification and the finals tournament (although [[New Zealand men's national football team|New Zealand]] was undefeated in the finals tournament, they did lose a game in qualification.)

In the qualifying rounds for the [[2014 FIFA World Cup]]  they were in the unusual position of being favorites to win their two-legged tie against neighbors [[United States Virgin Islands national soccer team|U.S. Virgin Islands]]. However, after losing the first leg 2–0 and the return leg 2–1, the British Virgin Islands once again failed to advance to the next round.

The [[2018 FIFA World Cup]] qualifying rounds saw British Virgin Islands take on Dominica with both legs taking place in Dominica, with the first leg acting as BVI's 'home ground' due to the away goal ruling. Despite taking the lead twice, the Islanders fell to a 3–2 defeat at 'home' and drew 0–0 away, meaning that once again first round qualification remained elusive.

The [[2022 FIFA World Cup]] qualifying rounds saw British Virgin Islands again knocked out in the [[2022 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|first round]], having lost all four of their group matches without scoring a goal.

At the commencement of [[2026 FIFA World Cup]] qualification, BVI advanced beyond the [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF first round|first round of qualifying]] for the first time in their history after beating the [[United States Virgin Islands national football team|U.S. Virgin Islands]] 1–1 on aggregate after penalties.<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/concacaf-british-virgin-islands-anguilla-history-qualification-football|title=British Virgin Islands and Anguilla progress for the first time|publisher=[[FIFA]]|date=27 March 2024}}</ref> In the [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round|second round]], they were drawn into Group E with [[Guatemala national football team|Guatemala]], [[Dominica national football team|Dominica]], [[Jamaica national football team|Jamaica]] and the [[Dominican Republic national football team|Dominican Republic]] and finished bottom without even scoring a single goal.

==Results and fixtures==
{{Main|British Virgin Islands national football team results}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[exhibition match|Friendly]]
|date       = 29 May
|time       = 
|team1      = {{fb-rt|SVG}}
|score      = 1–1
|team2      = {{fb|BVI}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
*[[Kirtney Franklyn]] {{goal|84}}
|goals2     =
*[[Jerry Wiltshire]] {{goal|55}}
|location   = [[Arnos Vale, Saint Vincent and the Grenadines|Arnos Vale]], [[Saint Vincent and the Grenadines]]
|stadium    = [[Arnos Vale Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = D
}}
{{Football box collapsible
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round]]
| date       = 4 June
|time       = {{UTZ|15:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|DMA}}
|score      = 3–0
|team2      = {{fb|VGB}}
| report     = https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017770
|goals1     =
*[[Audel Laville|Laville]] {{goal|29||75}}
*[[Troy Jules|Jules]] {{goal|35}}
|goals2     =
[[Warner Dwayne Brown|Brown]] {{goal|17}}
| location   = [[Roseau]], Dominica
| stadium    = [[Windsor Park (Dominica)|Windsor Park]]
| attendance = 754
| referee    = Karen Hernández ([[Mexican Football Federation|Mexico]])
| result     = L
}}
{{Football box collapsible
| round      = [[2026 FIFA World Cup qualification – CONCACAF second round]]
| date       = 7 June
| time       = {{UTZ|15:00|-4}}
| team1      = {{fb-rt|VGB}}
| score      = 0–1
| team2      = {{fb|JAM}}
| report     = https://www.fifa.com/fifaplus/en/match-centre/match/520/288301/288302/400017763
| goals1     =
| goals2     =
[[Warner Dwayne Brown|Brown]] {{goal|17}}
| location   = [[Road Town]], British Virgin Islands
| stadium    = [[A. O. Shirley Recreation Ground]]
| attendance = 
| referee    = Bryan López ([[National Football Federation of Guatemala|Guatemala]])
| result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[exhibition match|Friendly]]
|date       = 8 October
|time       = {{UTZ|18:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|GRN}}
|score      = 4–1
|team2      = {{fb|VGB}}
|report     = https://www.espn.com/soccer/match/_/gameId/759725/british-virgin-islands-grenada
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = [[St. George's, Grenada|St. George's]], Grenada
|stadium    = [[Kirani James Athletic Stadium]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 12 November
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CAY}}
|score      = 1–2
|team2      = {{fb|BVI}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands 
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = W
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 15 November
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|BAH}}
|score      = 0–6
|team2      = {{fb|BVI}}
|report     = 
|goals1     =
|goals2     =
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands 
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = W
}}

===2026===
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 26 March
|time       = {{UTZ|19:00|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|CAY}}
|score      = 1–1
|team2      = {{fb|VGB}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-27/cayman-islands-vs-british-virgin-islands/4095366
|goals1     =
*[[Shakurn Silburn|Silburn]] {{goal|7}}
|goals2     =
*[[Javaun Splatt|Splatt]] {{goal|20}}
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Alexi Perry]] ([[Jamaica Football Federation|Jamaica]])
|result     = D
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 29 March
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-5}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|VGB}}
|score      = 4–0
|team2      = {{fb|AIA}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-29/british-virgin-islands-vs-anguilla/4095372
|goals1     = *[[Tyler Forbes (footballer, born 2002)|T. Forbes]] {{goal|5||39}}
*[[Luka Chalwell|Chalwell]] {{goal|32|pen.}}
*[[Johari Lacey|Lacey]] {{goal|78}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[George Town, Cayman Islands|George Town]], Cayman Islands
|stadium    = [[Truman Bodden Sports Complex]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Sergio Rozenhout ([[Surinamese Football Association|Suriname]])
|result     = W
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round             = [[Exhibition game#Association football|Friendly]]
|date              = {{Start date|2026|06|03|df=y}}
|time              = 19:00
|score             = 4–0
|report            = [https://www.uefa.com/european-qualifiers/friendlies/match/2048312--gibraltar-vs-british-virgin-islands/ UEFA]<br>[https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/cesdwwnxbc5fmajgroc0hqzy2/dezv8l0fzgcxtejl0dwmy1gyc/2m9n05frk6wimte4qrptzyxp0/ehzoa2kobnxl2ahljio562ivo?date=2026-06-03 FIFA]
|team1             = {{fb-rt|GIB}}
|goals1            =
*[[Johari Lacey|Lacey]] {{goal|10|o.g.}}
*[[James Scanlon (footballer)|J. Scanlon]] {{goal|32||64}}
*[[Leon Mason|Mason]] {{goal|42}}
|team2             = {{fb|VGB}}
|goals2            =
|stadium           = [[Europa Sports Park|Europa Point Stadium]]
|location          = [[Europa Point]], Gibraltar
|attendance        = 
|referee           = Antoine Chiaramonti ([[Andorran Football Federation|Andorra]])
|result            = L
}}
{{footballbox collapsible
|round             = [[Exhibition game#Association football|Friendly]]
|date              = {{Start date|2026|06|06|df=y}}
|time              = 19:00
|score             = 0–2
|report            = 
|team1             = {{fb-rt|BOE}}
|goals1            =
|team2             = {{fb|VGB}}
|goals2            =
*[[Joshua Bertie|Bertie]] {{goal}}
*[[Luka Chalwell|Chalwell]] {{goal}}
|stadium           = 
|location          = [[Malaga]], Spain
|attendance        = 
|referee           = 
|result            = W
}}

==Coaching history==
{{div col|colwidth=17em}}
* {{flagicon|ENG}} [[Gary White (footballer)|Gary White]] (1998–1999)
* {{flagicon|BVI}} [[Gregory Grant]] (2000)
* {{flagicon|USA}} [[William H. Moravek]] (2000–01)
* {{flagicon|BVI}} [[Patrick Mitchell (football manager)|Patrick Mitchell]] (2002)
* {{flagicon|JAM}} [[Michael Tulloch (footballer)|Michael Tulloch]] (2004)
* {{flagicon|BVI}} [[Ben Davies (football manager)|Ben Davies]] (2004)
* {{flagicon|BVI}} [[Patrick Mitchell (football manager)|Patrick Mitchell]] (2008)
* {{flagicon|BVI}} [[Avondale Williams]] (2008–2018)
* {{flagicon|IRL}} [[John Reilly (football coach)|John Reilly]] (2018–2020)
* {{flagicon|ENG}} [[Dan Neville (football coach)|Dan Neville]] (2021)
* {{flagicon|ENG}} [[Chris Kiwomya]] (2021–2025)
* {{flagicon|ESP}} [[David Pérez (football manager)|David Pérez]] (2025–)<ref>https://inside.fifa.com/associations/VGB/organisation</ref>
{{div col end}}

==Players==
===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the friendlis against [[Gibraltar national football team|Gibraltar]] and [[Bonaire national football team|Bonaire]] on 3 and 6 June 2026.<ref>{{cite web |title=BVI MEN’S NATIONAL TEAM SQUAD |url=https://www.facebook.com/bvifootball/posts/pfbid0JtcfCBq2LTqstNoqe3HfH7Kg6sDLLBpPGuRuNLCyDx12YFC7yE25sK77KzcUqP4Ml |website=Facebook |publisher=The BVI Football Association |access-date=27 May 2026 |date=25 May 2026}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 3 June 2026, after match against [[Gibraltar national football team|Gibraltar]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 1|pos=GK|name=[[Toby Whiteside]]|age={{birth date and age|2008|04|24|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Eastbourne Borough F.C.|Eastbourne Borough]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=18|pos=GK|name=[[Harry Foden]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|8|26|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Portland United F.C.|Portland United]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 3|pos=DF|name=[[Joshua Bertie]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|10|9|df=y}}|caps=23|goals=1|club=[[Downton F.C.|Downton]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=13|pos=DF|name=[[Ikyjah Williams]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|4|14|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=0|club=[[Virgin Gorda United]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs g player|no=15|pos=DF|name=[[Jaden Abrams]]|age={{Birth date and age|2007|4|20|df=y}}|caps=19|goals=0|club=[[Virgin Gorda United]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 4|pos=DF|name=[[T'Khoi Morton]]|age={{Birth date and age|2007|10|10|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Virgin Gorda United]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs g player|no=14|pos=DF|name=[[Quelahni Nickie]]|age={{birth date and age|2004|02|19|df=yes}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Virgin Gorda United]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 5|pos=DF|name=[[Momchil Yordanov]]|age={{Birth date and age|2007|2|28|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Lancing F.C.|Lancing]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 2|pos=MF|name=[[Kristian Javier]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|4|6|df=y}}|caps=34|goals=2|club=[[Pigotts Bullets F.C.|Pigotts Bullets]]|clubnat=ATG}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 6|pos=MF|name=[[T'Sharne Gallimore]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|8|20|df=y}}|caps=28|goals=1|club=[[Bedford Town F.C.|Bedford Town]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 8|pos=MF|name=[[Luka Chalwell]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|4|11|df=y}}|caps=27|goals=5|club=[[Bishop's Stortford F.C.|Bishop's Stortford]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=12|pos=MF|name=[[William Robert Green|William Green]]|age={{Birth date and age|1997|9|5|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=0|club=[[Islanders FC]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 7|pos=MF|name=[[Joel Mars]]|age={{Birth date and age|2007|2|16|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Virgin Gorda United]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs g player|no=21|pos=MF|name=[[Alejandro Santos (footballer)|Alejandro Santos]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|11|23|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Wolues FC|Wolues]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs g player|no=10|pos=MF|name=[[Rush Broderick]]|age={{Birth date and age|2007|07|24|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Wolues FC|Wolues]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=20|pos=FW|name=[[Tyler Forbes (footballer, born 2002)|Tyler Forbes]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|4|18|df=y}}|caps=33|goals=4|club=[[Tilbury F.C.|Tilbury]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=11|pos=FW|name=[[Johari Lacey]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|12|15|df=y}}|caps=16|goals=1|club=[[Rebels FC]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs g player|no= 9|pos=FW|name=[[Javaun Splatt]]|age={{birth date and age|2001|02|18|df=yes}}|caps=8|goals=5|club=[[Margate F.C.|Margate]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=16|pos=FW|name=[[Adrian Padilla]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|02|15|df=yes}}|caps=7|goals=0|club=[[CF Trival Valderas|Trival Valderas]]|clubnat=ESP}}
{{nat fs g player|no=17|pos=FW|name=[[Decoi Prince]]|age={{Birth date and age|2007|3|8|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Virgin Gorda United]]|clubnat=BVI}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Frankie Beckles]]|age={{birth date and age|2007|3|11|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[AFC Croydon Athletic]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|AIA}}, 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Abidan Edwards]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|10|7|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Newtown A.F.C.|Newtown]]|latest=v. {{fb|JAM}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jerry Wiltshire]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|2|4|df=y}}|caps=17|goals=1|club=[[Leatherhead F.C.|Leatherhead]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|AIA}}, 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Charles Medway]]|age={{birth date and age|2002|6|2|df=yes}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Bournemouth F.C.]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|AIA}}, 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Troy Caesar]]|age={{Birth date and age|1994|5|13|df=y}}|caps=29|goals=3|club=[[Islanders FC|Islanders]]|clubnat=BVI|latest=v. {{fb|JAM}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Miguel Marshall]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|4|11|df=y}}|caps=26|goals=0|club=[[Poole Town F.C.|Poole Town]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|JAM}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Aaron Matthews]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|4|2|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Poole Borough F.C.]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|JAM}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Justin Smith (footballer, born April 2003)|Justin Smith]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|4|11|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=1|club=[[One Love United FC|One Love United]]|clubnat=BVI|latest=v. {{fb|GRN}}, 8 October 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Latriel Williams]]|age={{Birth date and age|2008|9|10|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Virgin Gorda United]]|clubnat=BVI|latest=v. {{fb|GRN}}, 8 October 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Carson Price]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|3|14|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Incarnate Word Cardinals]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|AIA}}, 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Marc Tan]]|age={{Birth date and age|2009|3|26|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Rebels FC]]|clubnat=BVI|latest=v. {{fb|AIA}}, 30 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Levon Williams]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|4|27|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Virgin Gorda United]]|clubnat=BVI|latest=v. {{fb|JAM}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jake Forbes (footballer)|Jake Forbes]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|11|04|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[Poole Town F.C.|Poole Town]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|JAM}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Hugo Liziário]]|age={{Birth date and age|1993|02|12|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=1|club=[[Wolues FC|Wolues]]|clubnat=BVI|latest=v. {{fb|JAM}}, 7 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
* {{small|INJ}} = Withdrew due to injury
* {{small|PRE}} = Preliminary squad
* {{small|TRA}} = Training player
* {{small|WD}}  = Withdrew (non-injury)
* {{small|RET}} = Retired
{{nat fs end}}

==Player records==
{{updated|6 June 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=British Virgin Islands |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/29/British_Virgin_Islands.html |website=National Football Teams}}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with British Virgin Islands''.

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:175px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Kristian Javier]]'''
|34
|2
|2016–present
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Tyler Forbes (footballer, born 2002)|Tyler Forbes]]'''
|33
|4
|2018–present
|-
|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Troy Caesar]]'''
|29
|3
|2010–present
|-
|4
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[T'Sharne Gallimore]]'''
|28
|1
|2018–present
|-
|5
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Luka Chalwell]]'''
|27
|5
|2021–present
|-
|6
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Miguel Marshall]]'''
|26
|0
|2019–present
|-
|7
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Joshua Bertie]]'''
|23
|1
|2018–present
|-
|rowspan=2|8
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Robert Green (British Virgin Islands footballer)|Robert Green]]'''
|22
|0
|2018–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Ikyjah Williams]]'''
|22
|0
|2021–present
|-
|rowspan=2|10
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Carlos Septus]]'''
|19
|1
|2011–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Jaden Abrams]]'''
|19
|0
|2023–present
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:175px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|rowspan=3|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Javaun Splatt]]'''
|5
|8
|{{#expr:5/8 round 2}}
|2025–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Avondale Williams]]
|5
|14
|{{#expr:5/14 round 2}}
|2000–2012
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Luka Chalwell]]'''
|5
|27
|{{#expr:5/27 round 2}}
|2021–present
|-
|4
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Tyler Forbes (footballer, born 2002)|Tyler Forbes]]'''
|4
|33
|{{#expr:4/33 round 2}}
|2018–present
|-
|rowspan=2|5
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Jairo Morris]]
|3
|5
|{{#expr:3/5 round 2}}
|2004
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Troy Caesar]]'''
|3
|37
|{{#expr:3/37 round 2}}
|2010–present
|-

|rowspan=7|7
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Henroy Mitchell]]
|2
|1
|{{#expr:2/1 round 2}}
|2010
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Michael Huggins (footballer)|Michael Huggins]]
|2
|2
|{{#expr:2/2 round 2}}
|2002
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Peterson Azille]]
|2
|6
|{{#expr:2/6 round 2}}
|2000–2004
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Garret Ferron]]
|2
|6
|{{#expr:2/6 round 2}}
|2000–2004
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Venton James]]
|2
|8
|{{#expr:2/8 round 2}}
|2004–2008
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Rohan Lennon]]
|2
|13
|{{#expr:2/13 round 2}}
|2000–2008
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Kristian Javier]]'''
|2
|34
|{{#expr:2/34 round 2}}
|2016–present
|-
|}

==Competitive record==
===FIFA World Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[FIFA World Cup]] record
!rowspan=13|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]||colspan=9|''Not a FIFA member''
|colspan=6|''Not a FIFA member''
|-
|{{flagicon|South Korea|1997}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]||colspan=9 rowspan=7|''Did not qualify''
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 1
| 14
|-
|{{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 10
|-
|{{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
| 2
| 0
| 2
| 0
| 3
| 3
|-
|{{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 1
| 4
|-
|{{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
| 2
| 0
| 1
| 1
| 2
| 3
|-
|{{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
| 4
| 0
| 0
| 4
| 0
| 19
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| 6
| 0
| 2
| 4
| 1
| 12
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]||colspan=9 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/7!!colspan=7|—
!20!!0!!5!!15!!8!!65
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=10|[[CONCACAF Championship]] / [[CONCACAF Gold Cup|Gold Cup]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!Squad
|-
|[[1963 CONCACAF Championship|1963]] to [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]]||colspan=9|''Not a CONCACAF member''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]||colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]||colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]]||colspan=9 rowspan=9|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Costa Rica}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]
|-
|{{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|United States of America}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/14!!colspan=7|—
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=22|[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
!colspan=11|League phase
!rowspan=8|
!colspan=10|Final phase
|-
!Season
!{{Tooltip|Div.|Division}}
!Group
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
! {{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/Relegation}}
!Finals
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019–20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group B|B]]
|12th||4||0||0||4||5||15||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]||colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group D|D]]
|13th||4||0||2||2||3||11||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group B|B]]
|4th||4||1||2||1||7||6||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group C|C]]
|9th||4||0||0||4||1||7||{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League|2026–27]]
|[[2026–27 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]||colspan=9|''To be determined''
|[[2027 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2027]]
|-
!colspan=4|Total!!16!!1!!4!!11!!16!!39!!—
!Total!!colspan=9|—
|}
{| class="wikitable collapsible collapsed" style="text-align:center; font-size:90%;"
|-
!colspan=2|CONCACAF Nations League history
|-
!First match
|{{fb|BOE}} 4–2 {{fb-rt|VGB}}<br>(6 September 2019; [[Willemstad]], Curaçao)
|-
!Biggest Win
|{{fb-rt|VGB}} 3–1 {{fb|TCA}}<br>(9 September 2023; [[Road Town]], British Virgin Islands)
|-
!Biggest Defeat
|{{fb|PUR}} 6–0 {{fb-rt|VGB}}<br>(12 June 2022; [[Mayagüez, Puerto Rico|Mayagüez]], Puerto Rico)
|-
!Best Result
|4th – League C ([[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League#League C|2023–24]])
|-
!Worst Result
|13th – League C ([[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League#League C|2022–23]])
|}

===Caribbean Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!colspan=9|[[CFU Championship]] / [[Caribbean Cup]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!{{Tooltip|Pos.|Position}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1978 CFU Championship|1978]] to [[1988 CFU Championship|1988]]||colspan=8|''Not a CFU member''
|-
|{{flagicon|Barbados}} [[1989 Caribbean Cup|1989]]||colspan=8 rowspan=6|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1990 Caribbean Cup|1990]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1992 Caribbean Cup|1992]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1993 Caribbean Cup|1993]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Cayman Islands}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]]||colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1996 Caribbean Cup|1996]]||colspan=8|''Did not participate''
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} {{flagicon|SKN}} [[1997 Caribbean Cup|1997]]||colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} {{flagicon|TRI}} [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]
|-
|{{flagicon|TRI}} [[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Barbados}} [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]||colspan=8|''Withdrew''
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[2008 Caribbean Cup|2008]]||colspan=8 rowspan=5|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2010 Caribbean Cup|2010]]
|-
|{{flagicon|ATG}} [[2012 Caribbean Cup|2012]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[2014 Caribbean Cup|2014]]
|-
|{{flagicon|MTQ|snake}} [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]
|-
!Total!!—!!0/16!!colspan=7|—
|}

==Honours==
===Friendly===
* '''[[Leeward Islands Tournament]] (1)''': 1986

==References==
{{Reflist}}

==External links==
*[https://web.archive.org/web/20140107100031/http://www.fifa.com/associations/association=vgb/ British Virgin Islands] – FIFA.com (archived 7 January 2014)
*[http://caribbeanfootballdatabase.com/britishvirginislands/team.html British Virgin Islands]. {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150326005347/http://caribbeanfootballdatabase.com/britishvirginislands/team.html |date=26 March 2015 }}. ''caribbeanfootballdatabase.com''.

{{British Virgin Islands national football team}}
{{Football in the British Virgin Islands}}
{{UK National Football teams}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of the British Virgin Islands}}

[[Category:British Virgin Islands national football team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
